PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(COUNT(DISTINCT ?superBowl) AS ?count) WHERE {
  wd:Q193390 wdt:P1344 ?superBowl .
  ?superBowl rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en" && CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "super bowl"))
}
